commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Whither wilt thou By these words the disciples teach us to direct our every step according to the will of God; therefore does their Lord tell them, with whom he would eat the pasch, to go two of them into the city. (St. Jerome)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: The Passover affords a more than usually solemn day for baptism. For that is the day when in effect the Lord’s passion, into which we are baptized, was completed.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content:
On the first day of unleavened bread, on which they slew the lamb at even, just as had been enjoined by Moses.
. Which prediction was thus also fulfilled, that "on the first day of unleavened bread"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
